name: EthicVote
title: DRKS Ethic Vote
description: Internal ethics committee vote result codes as used in the DRKS (Deutsches Register Klinischer Studien). Represents the outcome of the ethics committee review for a registered clinical study.

concept.definition: The ethics committee has approved the study. Recruitment may proceed.
The ethics committee has determined that no formal approval is required for this study.
The ethics committee review has been submitted but a decision has not yet been issued.
